'''√ng-k-k''' ('''kangakak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:queue|queue]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-k-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:queue|queue]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √ng-k-k
|-
! Lemma
| kangakak
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thingakak || jingakak || shingakak || kingakak
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthungakak || jujungakak || shushungakak || kukungakak
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thungakak || jungakak || shungakak || kungakak
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thungakak || jungakak || shungakak || kungakak
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thengakak || jengakak || shengakak || kengakak
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothongakak || jojongakak || shoshongakak || kokongakak
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thongakak || jongakak || shongakak || kongakak
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thongakak || jongakak || shongakak || kongakak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ngakak || ngakak || ngakak || ngakak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ngakak || ngakak || ngakak || ngakak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ngakak || ngakak || ngakak || ngakak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ngakak || ngakak || ngakak || ngakak
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thængakak || jængakak || shængakak || kængakak
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathangakak || jajangakak || shashangakak || kakangakak
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thangakak || jangakak || shangakak || kangakak
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thangakak || jangakak || shangakak || kangakak
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shangakak
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshangakak
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishangakak
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shangakaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshangakaknknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishangakaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shangakakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshangakaknkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishangakakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shangakakro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshangakaknkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishangakakro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shangakakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshangakaknkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishangakakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shangakaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshangakaknksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishangakaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shangakakng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshangakaknkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishangakakng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shangakakya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshangakaknkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishangakakya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shangakakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshangakaknkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishangakakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shangakaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshangakaknknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishangakaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shangakaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangakaknknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangakaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shangakaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshangakaknknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangakaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shangakakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshangakaknkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishangakakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shangakakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangakaknkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangakakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shangakakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshangakaknkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangakakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shangakakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshangakaknkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishangakakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shangakakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshangakaknkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishangakakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shangakakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshangakaknkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishangakakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shangakakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshangakaknkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishangakakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shangakakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshangakaknkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishangakakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shangakakmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshangakaknkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishangakakmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
